languages.text: "Именно потому мы и сражаемся с ним. Лучше умереть, чем дать его порче запятнать себя".
"That is why we fight the Archenemy. Better to die than to let its corruption taint us."
languages.original_text: "Именно потому мы и сражаемся с ним. Лучше умереть, чем дать его порче запятнать себя".

traits.locale_text: "That is why we fight the Archenemy. Better to die than to let its corruption taint us."
"That is why we fight the Archenemy. Better to die than to let its corruption taint us."
"That is why we fight the Archenemy. Better to die than to let its corruption taint us."

languages.text: 「だから我々は敵と戦う。腐敗に染まるよりは死んだ方がましだ」
languages.original_text: "That is why we fight the Archenemy. Better to die than to let its corruption taint us."

languages.text: "Bu yüzden Şerbaşı ile savaşıyoruz. Yozlaşmasının bizi lekelemesine izin vermektense ölmek yeğdir."
languages.original_text: "That is why we fight the Archenemy. Better to die than to let its corruption taint us."

traits.locale_text: "Bu yüzden Şerbaşı ile savaşıyoruz. Yozlaşmasının bizi lekelemesine izin vermektense ölmek yeğdir."

languages.text: “这就是我们与混沌大敌作战的原因。宁死也不能让它的腐化玷污我们。”
languages.original_text: "That is why we fight the Archenemy. Better to die than to let its corruption taint us."

traits.locale_text: “这就是我们与混沌大敌作战的原因。宁死也不能让它的腐化玷污我们。”

languages.text: "Deshalb bekämpfen wir den Erzfeind. Es ist besser, zu sterben, als von seiner Verderbtheit befallen zu werden."
languages.original_text: "That is why we fight the Archenemy. Better to die than to let its corruption taint us."

traits.locale_text: "Deshalb bekämpfen wir den Erzfeind. Es ist besser, zu sterben, als von seiner Verderbtheit befallen zu werden."

languages.text: « C'est pourquoi nous luttons contre le Grand Ennemi. Mieux vaut mourir que nous laisser souiller par sa corruption. »
languages.original_text: "That is why we fight the Archenemy. Better to die than to let its corruption taint us."

traits.locale_text: « C'est pourquoi nous luttons contre le Grand Ennemi. Mieux vaut mourir que nous laisser souiller par sa corruption. »

languages.text: «Por eso luchamos contra el Archienemigo. Es mejor morir a ser mancillados por su corrupción».
languages.original_text: "That is why we fight the Archenemy. Better to die than to let its corruption taint us."

traits.locale_text: «Por eso luchamos contra el Archienemigo. Es mejor morir a ser mancillados por su corrupción».
